overview: CoinEarner is a rewards-based app where users earn coins by watching ads, claiming daily streak rewards, referring others, and completing tasks. Coins convert to INR and can be withdrawn via UPI, Paytm, or bank transfer. Features a comprehensive admin panel for managing users, withdrawals, earnings, fraud protection, and announcements.
features: Earn coins by watching ads, daily streaks, referrals, and tasks
Convert coins to INR (1000 coins = ₹10) with UPI/Paytm/bank withdrawal
Leaderboard showing top 50 weekly and all-time earners with personal rank
Admin panel with user management, withdrawal approvals, earnings control, fraud detection
Real-time coin balance and rupee balance tracking
Referral system with invite codes and bonus tracking
Fraud protection with automatic flagging and admin review workflow
